name: Refrigerator Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter, egg, and vanilla until mixed and fluffy.
2. Gradually beat in the dry ingredients, mixing well after each addition.
3. Mix in the dates, coconut, and 1/4 cup of the nuts.
4. Form the dough into two 1-1/2 inch logs.
5. Roll the logs in the remaining nuts (1/4 cup each).
6. Wrap the logs in waxed paper and chill (or freeze) until firm enough to slice.
7. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
8. Slice cookies 1/4 inch thick and place on a nonstick cookie sheet.
9. Bake for 10-12 minutes until light golden brown.
10. Cool on wire racks.
2 cookies contain approximately:
- 1 cup of fat
- 1/2 cup of fruit (dates)
- 1/4 cup of nuts
- About 95 calories from carbohydrates
- No protein or fat from the nut portion
Approved by the Diabetic Association.
